store_headline: Urban Music WordPress Theme for Artists and Labels
store_subheadline: Launch a music site with discography, artist pages, events, videos, and merch in one place.
features: Built with Elementor page builder for easy customization
Artist custom post type with bios and media galleries
Event listing and tour date functionality
Video gallery with custom player options
Wolf Core plugin with music-specific elements for Elementor
Content Blocks system for custom headers and footers
One-click demo import with complete content
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
selling_points: Urban music aesthetic built for mainstream hip-hop and R&B — the chart-oriented counterpart to Hyperbent's underground darkness
Wolf Artists creates individual artist pages linked to releases, events, and videos — solo act or label
Comprehensive feature set — discography, artist pages, events, videos, merch — without third-party plugins
Elementor-powered so urban artists can update drops, tour dates, and content without a developer
Spotify integration for streaming tracks directly from artist and release pages
WooCommerce merch store built in — sell limited drops and branded gear without a separate store
Street-level contemporary visual identity that mainstream hip-hop and R&B artists recognize as their own
key_benefits: Build a complete urban music platform without stitching together multiple themes
Manage an artist roster or solo career with the same taxonomy system
Attract industry attention with a mainstream visual identity, not DIY
Sell merch and promote tours from one site fans take seriously
Convert fan visits into merch purchases with WooCommerce at theme level
Showcase streaming, live, visual, and retail from a single cohesive platform
design_features: Custom music player with playlist support

testimonials.text: This is the second Wolf Themes theme we've used. They are great themes. Just had an excellent support request solved as well as I could of asked as well.
testimonials.author: cosmicfantasia

testimonials.text: TSuperb theme - superb up-to-date design. Support is great - please ignore my previous comments - once these guys figured out what the issue was they were right on it. Very easy to customise this theme as well - highly recommended.
testimonials.author: Bobbafet
